channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: browser-use/browser-harness
item.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.

item.title: kyegomez/OpenMythos
item.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.

item.title: EvoLinkAI/awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
item.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts and image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.

item.title: getagentseal/codeburn
item.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability.

item.title: cathrynlavery/diagram-design
item.description: Thirteen editorial diagram types for Claude Code. Self-contained HTML + SVG. No shadows, no Mermaid-slop.

item.title: getagentseal/codeburn
item.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability.

item.title: ZeroZ-lab/cc-design
item.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents

item.title: drasimwagan/mdv
item.description: MDV — a Markdown superset for documents, dashboards, and slides with embedded data and visualizations. HTML + PDF export, live preview, VS Code extension.

item.title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: bwjoke/BTC-Trading-Since-2020
item.description: Public BTC trading context since 2020.

item.title: lsdefine/GenericAgent
item.description: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption

item.title: mandiant/gopacket
item.description: Gopacket is a clean Go implementation of Impacket, a library intended for working with network protocols.

item.title: anthropics/claude-desktop-buddy
item.description: Reference and an example for the Bluetooth API for makers in Claude Cowork & Claude Code Desktop

item.title: smol-machines/smolvm
item.description: Tool to build & run portable, lightweight, self-contained virtual machines.

item.title: thunderbird/thunderbolt
item.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.

item.title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
item.description: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

item.title: heygen-com/hyperframes
item.description: Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

item.title: Lazarus-AI/clearwing
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Nightmare-Eclipse/RedSun
item.description: The Red Sun vulnerability repository

item.title: jackwener/wx-cli
item.description: WeChat local data CLI with daemon architecture

item.title: GainSec/AutoProber
item.description: Hardware hacker’s flying probe automation stack for agent-driven target discovery, microscope mapping, safety-monitored CNC motion, probe review, and controlled pin probing.

item.title: BuilderPulse/BuilderPulse
item.description: AI-powered daily intelligence for indie hackers and builders. 20 questions, 10+ sources, every morning.

item.title: Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-World-2.0
item.description: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds

item.title: xataio/xata
item.description: Open source, cloud native, Postgres platform with copy-on-write branching and scale-to-zero

item.title: op7418/logo-generator-skill
item.description: logo-generator-skill

item.title: browser-use/video-use
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Manavarya09/design-extract
item.description: Extract the complete design language from any website — colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and more. npx CLI + Claude Code plugin.

item.title: Jakubantalik/border-beam
item.description: Animated border beam effect for React

item.title: android/skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: vercel-labs/wterm
item.description: A terminal emulator for the web

item.title: poteto/how
item.description: skill for explaining architecture

item.title: jurplel/InstantSpaceSwitcher
item.description: Native space switching on macOS with no animation

item.title: Cocoon-AI/architecture-diagram-generator
item.description: Generate beautiful dark-themed system architecture diagrams as standalone HTML/SVG files. Works as a Claude AI skill.

item.title: momenbasel/PureMac
item.description: Free, open-source macOS cleaner. CleanMyMac alternative with zero telemetry. Native SwiftUI, scheduled auto-cleaning, Xcode/Homebrew/system cache cleanup. MIT licensed.

item.title: alejandrobalderas/claude-code-from-source
item.description: Architecture, patterns & internals of Anthropic's AI coding agent — reverse-engineered from source maps

item.title: vercel-labs/open-agents
item.description: An open source template for building cloud agents.

item.title: patterniha/SNI-Spoofing
item.description: Bypass DPI with IP/TCP-Header manipulation

item.title: AgentSeal/codeburn
item.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code and Codex cost observability.

item.title: brightbeanxyz/brightbean-studio
item.description: Open-source, self-hostable social media management platform. Schedule, publish, and manage content across 10+ platforms from a single dashboard. Free alternative to Buffer, Sendible, and SocialPilot.

item.title: xixu-me/awesome-persona-distill-skills
item.description: Curated list of Agent Skills centered on people, relationships, commemorative scenes, and methodological perspectives

item.title: jackwener/OpenCLI
item.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

item.title: safishamsi/graphify
item.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae, Google Antigravity). Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph

item.title: getpaseo/paseo
item.description: Orchestrate coding agents remotely from your phone, desktop and CLI

item.title: joeynyc/hermes-hudui
item.description: Web UI consciousness monitor for Hermes — the AI agent with persistent memory

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: markdown-viewer/skills
item.description: Opinionated skills for AI coding agents to create stunning diagrams and visualizations directly in Markdown. These skills extend agent capabilities across diagram generation, data visualization, and technical documentation.

item.title: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
item.description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
